reviews.comment:
Aquí me cargaron nafta adulterada, que luego tuve problemas con el auto al salir a la ruta. No carguen en esta estación, siempre es preferible pagar un poquitos pero cargar buena nafta como la shell. Tuve que hacer limpieza de inyectores por lo que hicieron

(Translated by Google)
Here they filled me with adulterated gas, which later caused car problems when I hit the road. Don't fill up at this station; it's always better to pay a little but get good gas like Shell. I had to have my injectors cleaned because of what they did.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bk02a2RBEAE
